revision.content:
I. Called to order @ 1814

II. Lease

A. Could continue with current lease, with continued adjustments

1. Mark has made other offer

B. 2025-2026

1. Lease: ~$2,000/month

2. Internet: ~$150/month

a. Supplies building

b. Bloominglabs pays

C. 2026-2027 - Mark's offer

1. Lease: $2,200/month

2. Internet: $150/month (Default amount)

a. Mark pays

b. Bloominglabs as tennant

D. Other concerns / Proposals

1. Annual rate increases

2. permission to remove woodshop island

3. water intrusion remediation by landlord

a. by September 30

4. 5 parking spaces, negotiate down to 2/3

a. overnight vs project

i. member overnight in shared lot

E. Separate from lease

1. Parking spaces

a. paid, long term parking for project vehicles

b. try to not have a policy written into lease

i. internal discussion may take longer than lease negotiation

c. posibility of multiple spaces in hidden back lot

2. Ask for five, negotiate down to 2/3

3. Overnight is a sticking point for Mark

F. Does anyone else have a relationship with Mark?

1. besides Jimmy

2. Jason Brown

3. Pete Kinne

III. Internet

A. Have informed Mark that we couldn't continue providing for the building

1. against terms of use

B. Mark's Proposal

1. We could determine ISP & Plan

a. Proposed - Gigabitnow

2. He would be primary customer

3. He would remove his equipment from out network closet

4. Do we want to agree?

a. we would need a hardwired line

b. Segregation from other tennants

c. If we turn down (IWTD), we could face increaed costs

d. IWTD, ceding leverage in lease negotiations

e. DECIDED - we will engage with marks proposal

IV. Makevention

A. Was postponed due to unforseen circumstances

B. Next meeting - first week of May

V. Adjourned @ 1925
